title: aster ageratoides var. scaberulus
intro: Aster ageratoides var. scaberulus, also known as Scaber Aster, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Aster ageratoides var. scaberulus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with its flowers and leaves being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
